goal: 修复 Agent Run UI 启动活动去重

summary.title: 修复 Agent Run UI 启动活动去重
summary.what: 在 sidepanel bootstrap 状态恢复时，对显式 runActivity items 与从 tool transcript 投影出的 activity items 按 id 保序去重，并新增回归测试覆盖同源 tool message 与 persisted activity 同时存在的场景。
summary.why: Cubic review 指出 applyBootstrapState 直接拼接两组 activity 会让同一个 tool call 在运行活动列表中重复显示；bootstrap 应优先复用 persisted activity，并只用 transcript projection 补齐缺失项。
summary.user_goal: 修复 Agent Run UI 启动活动去重

decisions.chose: 显式 runActivity items 放前面，再按 RunActivityItem.id 去重
decisions.rationale: persisted activity 可能包含展开状态或更完整的 activity 元数据；projection 只作为补齐旧 transcript 的 fallback。
rejected: 用 projected item 覆盖 persisted item
只删除 payload.runActivity 并完全依赖 transcript projection

review_notes: This intent is a follow-up on PR #18 and commit 576a7ef; the incremental code delta is apps/mv3-shell/src/sidepanel/state.ts and apps/mv3-shell/test/sidepanel-state.spec.ts.
seal --prepare reports the full PR diff because this fix was committed on the existing Agent Run UI PR branch.
Validation: focused regression test failed before the fix and passed after it; related sidepanel/runtime vitest suite, Biome check, typecheck, and git diff --check passed.

behavioral_changes: applyBootstrapState no longer emits duplicate run activity rows when payload.runActivity.items and payload.messages describe the same tool item id.
Persisted run activity metadata is preserved ahead of projected transcript fallback data.
